---
applyTo: "src/app/**/*.tsx,src/components/**/*.ts,src/components/**/*.tsx,src/lib/branding/**/*.ts,src/lib/branding/**/*.tsx"
---

# Frontend Instructions

- Preserve the established product language and branding direction.
- Cover loading, empty, error, and success states where relevant.
- Keep mobile, accessibility, and slow-network behavior in mind.
- Avoid generic UI patterns that clash with the existing system.
- If the change is user-facing, expect screenshots and responsive verification in the PR.
